code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut count = 0
mut i = 0
mut in_num = false
mut sign = 1
mut value = 0
mut has_digits = false

while i <= n
  mut b = 0
  if i < n
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(x)
      b = x
    when None
      b = 32
    end
  else
    b = 32
  end

  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or b == 11 or b == 12

  if is_ws
    if in_num and has_digits
      let final_value = value * sign
      if final_value > 0
        count = count + 1
      end
    end
    in_num = false
    sign = 1
    value = 0
    has_digits = false
  else
    if not in_num
      in_num = true
      sign = 1
      value = 0
      has_digits = false
      if b == 45
        sign = -1
      else if b == 43
        sign = 1
      else
        if b >= 48 and b <= 57
          value = b - 48
          has_digits = true
        end
      end
    else
      if b >= 48 and b <= 57
        value = value * 10 + (b - 48)
        has_digits = true
      end
    end
  end

  i = i + 1
end

println("positive=#{count}")
